combined_text_for_llm: Bass at the Drop of a Shot "Bass at the Drop of a Shot By Rich Zaleski It's new!Well, maybe it's not so new. Live bait fishermen have been using rigs with the hook (s) tied above the weight for eons, and that is the essence of drop shot (also known as under shot) rigging. OK, you say, but as a method for presenting soft plast

history.description: "Bass at the Drop of a Shot By Rich Zaleski It's new!Well, maybe it's not so new. Live bait fishermen have been using rigs with the hook (s) tied above the weight for eons, and that is the essence of drop shot (also known as under shot) rigging. OK, you say, but as a method for presenting soft plast
